'''鈭歞h-z-t-k''' ('''kadhaztekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lust|lust]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lust|lust]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-z-t-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadhaztekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhaztekoko|thidhaztekoko]] || [[word:jidhaztekoko|jidhaztekoko]] || [[word:shidhaztekoko|shidhaztekoko]] || [[word:kidhaztekoko|kidhaztekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhaztekoko|thodhaztekoko]] || [[word:jodhaztekoko|jodhaztekoko]] || [[word:shodhaztekoko|shodhaztekoko]] || [[word:kodhaztekoko|kodhaztekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhaztekoko|thodhaztekoko]] || [[word:jodhaztekoko|jodhaztekoko]] || [[word:shodhaztekoko|shodhaztekoko]] || [[word:kodhaztekoko|kodhaztekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhaztekoko|th忙dhaztekoko]] || [[word:j忙dhaztekoko|j忙dhaztekoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhaztekoko|sh忙dhaztekoko]] || [[word:k忙dhaztekoko|k忙dhaztekoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhaztekoko|thadhaztekoko]] || [[word:jadhaztekoko|jadhaztekoko]] || [[word:shadhaztekoko|shadhaztekoko]] || [[word:kadhaztekoko|kadhaztekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhaztekoko|thadhaztekoko]] || [[word:jadhaztekoko|jadhaztekoko]] || [[word:shadhaztekoko|shadhaztekoko]] || [[word:kadhaztekoko|kadhaztekoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
